wafv2.webacl.cookiematchpattern.CfnAbout:
The filter to use to identify the subset of cookies to inspect in a web request. 

You must specify exactly one setting: either `All`, `IncludedCookies`, or `ExcludedCookies`.

Example JSON: `"MatchPattern": { "IncludedCookies": [ "session-id-time", "session-id" ] }`

wafv2.webacl.cookiematchpattern.Excluded.Description: Inspect only the cookies whose keys don't match any of the strings specified here.

wafv2.webacl.cookiematchpattern.Included.Description: Inspect only the cookies that have a key that matches one of the strings specified here.
